title: New Interdisciplinary Research Center Opens Its Doors to Faculty and Students
description: The new facility brings together experts from engineering, bio-sciences, and data analytics to tackle some of the world's most pressing challenges.

title: Professor Smith Awarded Prestigious Grant for Sustainable Energy Project
description: The multi-million dollar grant will fund research into next-generation solar cells with higher efficiency and lower manufacturing costs.

title: Old Prompt Engineering vs. New Prompt Engineering: From Prompts to AI Workflows
description:
Old Prompt Engineering:
Designing the perfect prompt to get the best response from AI.

New Prompt Engineering:
Designing complete AI workflows where models, tools, memory, retrieval, and automation work together to solve real-world problems.

The industry is shifting from:
📝 “Write a better prompt”
to
⚙️ “Build a smarter AI system.”

Yesterday’s skill was asking AI the right question.
Today’s skill is architecting how AI thinks, acts, verifies, and collaborates across an entire workflow.

The future belongs to people who can combine:

AI Agents
RAG Systems
Automation
Tool Calling
Multi-step Reasoning
Human + AI Collaboration

Prompt Engineering is no longer just about prompts.
It’s becoming AI Workflow Engineering. 🚀
